summary: Tested all 8 Emotional UX Sprint features on mobile (390px) and desktop (1280px) viewports. All core features pass. 1 data-format note for allergy pill. Tested: Farewell toggle, Adopt hero/Mira quote, FirstTimePawrent on Adopt+Care, ConciergeRequestBuilder preselect+Step0, desktop button stack.

integration_issues.issue: Allergy info NOT showing in breed pill for Mojo (shows only 'Indie', no 'allergic to chicken, beef'). Root cause: Mojo's allergies stored as a health description string ('chicken, beef allergy - otherwise healthy'), NOT as structured arrays in pet.allergies, pet.health.allergies, or pet.dsa.food_allergies. ConciergeRequestBuilder code correctly spreads those arrays but they are all empty for this user. Not a code bug - data format mismatch between pet profile storage and component expectation.

passing_tests: Farewell mobile: 'While Mojo is here' toggle text correctly shows pet name ✅
Farewell mobile: 'When the time comes' toggle text is correct ✅
Farewell mobile: Toggle positioned BELOW hero section ✅
Farewell mobile: Clicking 'When the time comes' changes Mira bar text to 'You don't have to figure this out alone...' ✅
Farewell mobile: CTA changes from 'Capture Mojo's Story →' to 'Build Mojo's Farewell Plan →' ✅
Adopt mobile hero subtitle: 'Every dog deserves the right home' ✅
Adopt mobile Mira bar quote: 'The right match between a dog and their family changes two lives forever...' ✅
FirstTimePawrent card renders on Adopt mobile page (after GuidedAdoptPaths) ✅
FirstTimePawrent header: '🐾 First time with a dog?' with expand chevron ✅
FirstTimePawrent checklist expands showing 6 items (Vet registration, Feeding schedule, Safe space, First night guide, Emergency contacts, Week one routine) ✅
FirstTimePawrent card renders on Care mobile page ABOVE CareCategoryStrip (top=377 vs strip=495) ✅
FirstTimePawrent expand behavior same on Care page ✅
FirstTimePawrent CTA 'Build Mojo's First Week Plan →' found with data-testid='first-pawrent-cta-btn' ✅
FirstTimePawrent CTA opens ConciergeRequestBuilder modal ✅
ConciergeRequestBuilder opens on Step 1 (Life Stage Support questions) directly when preselect='lifestage' — NOT Step 0 ✅
ConciergeRequestBuilder Step 0 shows '✦ CONCIERGE® · REGISTERED TRADEMARK' header ✅
ConciergeRequestBuilder Step 0 shows breed pill with 'Indie' for Mojo ✅
ConciergeRequestBuilder Step 0 shows all 7 service cards ✅
Desktop Concierge® Requests button at bottom: 96px from viewport bottom, right: 24px ✅
Desktop Mira orb (Ask Mira) at bottom: 24px — BELOW Concierge button (visually stacked correctly) ✅
Desktop button stack: No overlapping — Concierge (96px) clearly above Mira orb (24px) ✅
action_items: LOW PRIORITY: ConciergeRequestBuilder allergy pill may not display for pets whose allergies are stored as a health description string rather than structured pet.allergies / pet.health.allergies / pet.dsa.food_allergies arrays. Consider mapping the health description allergy text to a structured field, or adding a fallback parser in ConciergeRequestBuilder that reads the health dimension text. Affects display only — no functional impact on concierge request flow.
critical_code_review_comments: ConciergeRequestBuilder.jsx: Allergy detection reads from 3 fields (pet.allergies, pet.health.allergies, pet.dsa.food_allergies). If pets store allergies as a string description in the health record (e.g. 'chicken, beef allergy - otherwise healthy'), the pill will only show the breed, not allergies. May need a data migration or parser to extract allergy items from the health dimension description text.
FarewellMobilePage.jsx: The farewellMode toggle uses local state correctly. Text and CTA both update reactively. Implementation is solid.

Desktop PillarPageLayout.jsx: Concierge button (bottom:96, zIndex:900) and Mira widget (bottom:24, zIndex:9999) do not overlap — correct stack. Mira's zIndex is higher but since it's lower in the viewport, no visual conflict.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 Emotional UX Sprint features verified working. Tested on mobile viewport 390px for Farewell/Adopt/Care pages and desktop 1280px for button stack. Key findings: (1) Farewell toggle fully functional with dynamic Mira text + CTA changes. (2) Adopt page hero/Mira quote updated correctly. (3) FirstTimePawrent renders correctly on both Adopt (below GuidedAdoptPaths) and Care (above CareCategoryStrip). (4) ConciergeRequestBuilder preselect='lifestage' correctly skips Step 0 to Step 1. (5) Desktop button stack: Concierge at 96px, Mira orb at 24px - no overlap. Only note: allergy pill only shows breed (Indie) but not allergies for test user Mojo, because allergies stored as description text not structured array.
rca_of_issue: Allergy pill in ConciergeRequestBuilder Step 0: Code reads from pet.allergies[], pet.health.allergies[], pet.dsa.food_allergies[]. Mojo's health record has 'chicken, beef allergy' as a descriptive text string in health dimensions, not as a structured array. The three checked fields are all empty arrays. Fix: Either store allergies as arrays in pet profile OR add a text parser in ConciergeRequestBuilder to extract allergy names from health description text.
